description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a detached garage, set on a rectangular lot with a driveway and a small front yard. The house features large windows, a wooden deck at the rear, and a minimalist garden with several green plants. The exterior walls are primarily white with some wooden paneling, and the roof of the garage is pitched with dark shingles. The main entrance is accessible from the driveway and is flanked by greenery, while the rear of the house opens onto a private deck area. The house is surrounded by a sidewalk and a street, indicating its placement in an urban or suburban neighborhood. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden rear deck, and a detached garage, surrounded by a driveway, sidewalk, and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, flat roof, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, back entrance, and the detached garage positioned to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side garden, and the connection between the front and rear outdoor spaces.
attribute_roof_type: flat with detached gable garage roof
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, minimal steps, flanked by plants, and no porch or overhang.
